kirundi.truth_tables_every_input_combination_e: Imbonerahamwe y'ukuri — buri guhuza kw'ivyinjira, buri gisohoka
kirundi.for_n_variables_the_table_has_2_rows_a: Kuri variyabuli n, imbonerahamwe ifite imirongo 2ⁿ. AND, OR, NOT, XOR, IFF — buri rembo ni inkingi imwe gusa. Aljebura ya Boolean (Boole, 1854) ni urufatiro rwa buri muyoboro wa dijitari, buri kibazo co gushaka, na buri gihe mu kode.
kirundi.modus_ponens_modus_tollens_hypothetica: Modus ponens, modus tollens, silogisme y'iciyumviro, silogisme yo gutandukanya — amategeko umunani yo gukurikiza akubiyemo igice kinini ca lojiki y'interuro y'intanguriro. Buri ntambwe yiyemeza binyuze ku IZINA, atari ku marangamutima.
kirundi.challenges_graded_tautology_contradict: Imbogamizi — ibisakuzo vya tautology n'ukwivuguruza biri ku rwego
kirundi.tautology_always_true_contradiction_al: Tautology = ukuri buri gihe; ukwivuguruza = ikinyoma buri gihe; uko vyagenda kose = rimwe na rimwe vyombi. Itegeko rya Aristote ryo kutivuguruza (350 MIK) ni itegeko rya kera cane ryasohotse. Imyitozo ya AP CS Principles + intanguriro y'imibare itandukanye.
kirundi.probability_logic_inference_under_unce: Lojiki y'amahirwe — gukurikiza mu buryo butatomoye
kirundi.p_and_q_each_carry_a_probability_inste: P na Q buri kimwe gifite amahirwe aho kuba ukuri/ikinyoma bikomeye. Ku bintu vyigenga, P(P∧Q) = P(P) × P(Q). Raba uko urugero rw'icizere ruhindura amahirwe yoroshe akaba gukurikiza gutandukanye.
kirundi.drag_tiles_or_click_to_add: Kurura ama tile canke fyonda kugira ngo wongereho
kirundi.drop_symbols_here_or_click_above: Rekura ibimenyetso hano canke fyonda hejuru…
kirundi.contingency_sometimes_true: ⚠️ Uko vyagenda kose (rimwe na rimwe ukuri)
kirundi.drag_or_click_to_select: Kurura canke fyonda kugira ngo utoranye
kirundi.drag_or_click_to_select_2: Kurura canke fyonda kugira ngo utoranye
kirundi.your_interests_basketball_cooking_vide: Ivyo ukunda (basketball, guteka, imikino ya videwo...)
kirundi.your_interests_for_ai_personalization: Ivyo ukunda kugira ngo AI ikorere wowe
kirundi.can_we_conclude_the_butler_is_innocent: Twashobora gufata umwanzuro ko umukozi atariho icaha?
kirundi.can_we_conclude_no_dark_clouds: Twashobora gufata umwanzuro ko nta bicu vyirabura?
kirundi.toggle_inputs_to_see_the_output_live: Hindura ivyinjira kugira ngo urabe igisohoka ako kanya
kirundi.sliders_for_p_q_truth_probabilities_co: Ama slider y'amahirwe y'ukuri ya P, Q n'urugero rw'icizere. Igisubizo co gukurikiza gutandukanye c'imiterere 4. Nta manota, nta guhishura.
kirundi.how_does_threshold_change_inference_ou: Urugero ruhindura gute igisubizo co gukurikiza?
kirundi.design_note_discrete_4_state_inference: Inyandiko y'igishushanyo: ikimenyetso co gukurikiza gutandukanye c'imiterere 4; nta manota y'amahirwe; nta guhishura — kubishaka.
kirundi.propositional_logic_studies_how_the_tr: Lojiki y'interuro yiga uburyo ukuri kw'imvugo zigoye kuterwa n'izoroshe.
kirundi.is_any_statement_that_is_either_true_o: ni imvugo iyo ari yo yose iri ukuri canke ikinyoma — nka «Imvura iragwa» canke «2 + 2 = 4».
kirundi.argument_guarantees_the_conclusion_if_: impaka itanga umwanzuro NIMBA ivyatangiwe ari ukuri.
kirundi.argument_fallacy_has_a_logical_gap_eve: impaka (ikosa rya lojiki) ifite icuho ca lojiki — n'iyo ivyatangiwe ari ukuri, umwanzuro ntukurikira ku gahato.
